mapper.select: SELECT category_no, parent_category_no, category_name, category_level, sort_order FROM category WHERE category_level = 1 ORDER BY sort_order, category_no
SELECT category_no, parent_category_no, category_name, category_level, sort_order FROM category WHERE parent_category_no = #{parentCategoryNo} ORDER BY sort_order, category_no
SELECT category_no, parent_category_no, category_name, category_level, sort_order FROM category ORDER BY category_level, sort_order, category_no
